description: The VS Code extension no longer auto-opens the Aspire Dashboard when an AppHost starts. Configure the preferred launch behavior — notification, external browser, integrated browser, or browser-debug — using the new `aspire.dashboardBrowser` setting or the per-launch `dashboardBrowser` property in `launch.json`. Legacy `aspire.enableAspireDashboardAutoLaunch` settings are preserved for backward compatibility.
name: Dashboard browser launch is now opt-in in VS Code
